title: AI autofill is inconsistent

posts.author: ChloeSmith (ChloeSmith)
posts.cookedHtml:
Just wondering if anybody else has been having issues with the AI autofill, it seems like every time I run it the results are different.

Here’s what I’m trying to do:

Untitled1293×468 79.9 KB

The instructions should be fairly simple but it seems like every time the preview runs, the results are different. This screenshot is from a worse-case scenario - none of the results are working at all - but sometimes it has something part-delivered set to received, for example.

Is there perhaps a way I can re-word the AI instructions to ensure it runs consistently? Or are there any plugins I can use that can do what I’m trying to do without having to rely on AI?
